description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image and define variables ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS=28.0.2, ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK=28, ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS=4333796. Add a global before_script that updates apt, installs wget tar unzip lib32stdc++6 lib32z1, downloads the Android SDK tools zip, unzips it, runs sdkmanager to install platforms;android-28, platform-tools and build-tools;28.0.2, sets ANDROID_HOME and updates PATH, makes gradlew executable, temporarily disables pipefail and accepts all SDK licenses. Define two stages build and test. In the build stage add an assembleDebug job that runs ./gradlew assembleDebug and publishes the app/build/outputs/ directory as an artifact, and a lintDebug job that runs ./gradlew -Pci --console=plain :app:lintDebug -PbuildDir=lint. In the test stage add a debugTests job that runs ./gradlew -Pci --console=plain :app:testDebug and a unitTests job that runs ./gradlew test.
